# Codantrix Labs

A multi-agent engineering studio building production agentic systems for SaaS, ops, and platform teams.

## Services

- Tier A: Production agentic systems. $15K — 30K. 6 — 10 weeks.
- Tier B: Agentic MVPs. $8K — 15K. 4 — 6 weeks.

## What we build

- Multi-agent orchestration with hierarchical retrieval
- Agentic copilots with domain-specific RAG
- Production observability + agent eval suites
- Client-facing dashboards over agent systems
- Document AI pipelines (English and Arabic)

## What we don't build

- Generic chatbots
- No-code workflow automations
- Enterprise compliance deployments (SOC 2, HIPAA — not our lane yet)

## Stack

Next.js · Python · OpenAI · Claude · LangGraph · pgvector · Milvus · AWS

## Verticals shipped

Real estate ops · Field ops dispatch · Construction estimation · EdTech learning · Document AI

## Founder

Hassan Ali Mehdi. Engineering lead. Six years shipping software. Lahore, Pakistan.

## Contact

Book a call: https://labs.codantrix.com/book
Email: contact@codantrix.com

## Engagement model

Fixed scope, fixed price. No hourly billing. SOW signed before any work begins. 50/50 payment terms. IP transfers on final payment. Owned codebase.
